name: scanner
description: Stage 1 of the security-audit Power. Runs SAST tools (semgrep, detect-secrets, dependency audits) and writes raw findings to .forge/scan-raw.json. Read-only on source.
verdictFormat:
VERDICT: PASS | FAIL | NEEDS_INFO
FINDINGS: <count>
SEVERITY: <none|low|medium|high|critical>
notes: Read-only on source. Writes ONLY to .forge/scan-raw.json. Picks tools based on what's installed, never assumes.
